description: A comprehensive WhatsApp messaging server providing tools for sending messages, media, and files, managing chats and groups, handling contacts, and updating profile settings.

tools.name: whatsapp_send_text_message
tools.description: Send a text message to a WhatsApp chat or group.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the recipient chat or group.

message.description: The text content of the message to send.

message_id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the sent message.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the recipient chat or group.

timestamp.description: The timestamp indicating when the message was sent.

tools.name: whatsapp_send_image
tools.description: Send an image to a WhatsApp chat or group with an optional caption.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the recipient chat or group.

image_path.description: The local file path to the image file (JPG/PNG format).

caption.description: Optional caption text to accompany the image.

message_id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the sent message.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the recipient chat or group.

timestamp.description: The timestamp indicating when the message was sent.

tools.name: whatsapp_send_file
tools.description: Send a file to a WhatsApp chat or group with an optional caption.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the recipient chat or group.

file_path.description: The local file path to the file to send (PDF, DOC, ZIP, etc.).

caption.description: Optional caption text to accompany the file.

message_id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the sent message.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the recipient chat or group.

file_path.description: The local file path of the file that was sent.

timestamp.description: The timestamp indicating when the message was sent.

tools.name: whatsapp_send_link
tools.description: Send a link with an optional preview to a WhatsApp chat or group.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the recipient chat or group.

url.description: The URL to share in the message.

preview_text.description: Optional text description for the link preview.

message_id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the sent message.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the recipient chat or group.

url.description: The URL that was shared in the message.

timestamp.description: The timestamp indicating when the message was sent.

tools.name: whatsapp_send_location
tools.description: Send a geographic location to a WhatsApp chat or group.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the recipient chat or group.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the location to share.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the location to share.

name.description: Optional name or label for the location.

message_id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the sent message.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the recipient chat or group.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the shared location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the shared location.

timestamp.description: The timestamp indicating when the message was sent.

tools.name: whatsapp_send_contact
tools.description: Send a contact card to a WhatsApp chat or group.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the recipient chat or group.

contact_phone.description: The phone number of the contact to share.

contact_name.description: The display name of the contact to share.

message_id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the sent message.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the recipient chat or group.

contact_phone.description: The phone number of the contact that was shared.

timestamp.description: The timestamp indicating when the message was sent.

tools.name: whatsapp_check_phone
tools.description: Check if a phone number is registered on WhatsApp.

phone.description: The phone number to check for WhatsApp registration.
The phone number that was checked.

is_registered.description: Indicates whether the phone number is registered on WhatsApp.

is_valid.description: Indicates whether the phone number format is valid.

tools.name: whatsapp_list_chats
tools.description: List all WhatsApp chats for the logged-in account.

limit.description: Optional maximum number of chats to return.

archived.description: Whether to include archived chats in the results. Defaults to false.

chats.description: The list of WhatsApp chats for the logged-in account.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the chat.

name.description: The display name of the chat or contact.

unread_count.description: The number of unread messages in the chat.

last_message.description: The content of the most recent message in the chat.

last_message_time.description: The timestamp of the most recent message in the chat.

tools.name: whatsapp_get_chat_messages
tools.description: Get message history from a specific WhatsApp chat or group.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the chat to retrieve messages from.

limit.description: Optional maximum number of messages to retrieve.

messages.description: The list of messages from the specified chat.

message_id.description: The unique identifier of the message.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the chat.

content.description: The text content of the message.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the message was sent.

type.description: The type of message (e.g., text, image, file).

tools.name: whatsapp_archive_chat
tools.description: Archive or unarchive a WhatsApp chat.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the chat to archive or unarchive.

archive.description: Set to true to archive the chat, false to unarchive.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the chat.

archived.description: The current archive status of the chat after the operation.

tools.name: whatsapp_create_group
tools.description: Create a new WhatsApp group with optional initial participants.

name.description: The name for the new WhatsApp group.

participants.description: Optional array of phone numbers to add as initial group participants.

group_id.description: The unique identifier (JID) of the newly created group.

name.description: The name of the newly created group.

participants.description: The list of phone numbers of participants added to the group.

tools.name: whatsapp_get_group_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a WhatsApp group.

group_id.description: The unique identifier (JID) of the group to retrieve information for.
The unique identifier (JID) of the group.

name.description: The current name of the group.

participants.description: The list of phone numbers of current group participants.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the group was created.

description.description: The current description of the group.

tools.name: whatsapp_add_group_participants
tools.description: Add new participants to an existing WhatsApp group.

group_id.description: The unique identifier (JID) of the group to add participants to.

participants.description: Array of phone numbers to add to the group.

group_id.description: The unique identifier (JID) of the group.

added_participants.description: The list of phone numbers that were successfully added to the group.

failed_participants.description: The list of phone numbers that failed to be added to the group.

tools.name: whatsapp_remove_group_participants
tools.description: Remove participants from an existing WhatsApp group.

group_id.description: The unique identifier (JID) of the group to remove participants from.

participants.description: Array of phone numbers to remove from the group.

group_id.description: The unique identifier (JID) of the group.

removed_participants.description: The list of phone numbers that were successfully removed from the group.

failed_participants.description: The list of phone numbers that failed to be removed from the group.

tools.name: whatsapp_update_group_name
tools.description: Update the name of an existing WhatsApp group.

group_id.description: The unique identifier (JID) of the group to update.

name.description: The new name for the group.

group_id.description: The unique identifier (JID) of the group.

name.description: The updated name of the group.

tools.name: whatsapp_update_group_description
tools.description: Update the description of an existing WhatsApp group.

group_id.description: The unique identifier (JID) of the group to update.

description.description: The new description for the group.

group_id.description: The unique identifier (JID) of the group.

description.description: The updated description of the group.

tools.name: whatsapp_leave_group
tools.description: Leave a WhatsApp group that the logged-in account is a member of.

group_id.description: The unique identifier (JID) of the group to leave.
The unique identifier (JID) of the group.

left.description: Indicates whether the account successfully left the group.

tools.name: whatsapp_get_profile_info
tools.description: Get profile information for a contact or the logged-in account.

phone.description: Optional phone number to get profile for. Omit to retrieve the logged-in account's profile.
The phone number associated with the profile.

name.description: The display name of the profile.

status.description: The status message set on the profile.

profile_picture_url.description: The URL to the profile picture image.

tools.name: whatsapp_change_push_name
tools.description: Change the display name (push name) of the logged-in WhatsApp account.

push_name.description: The new display name for the logged-in account.
The updated display name of the account.

updated.description: Indicates whether the display name was successfully updated.

tools.name: whatsapp_change_avatar
tools.description: Change the profile avatar/picture of the logged-in WhatsApp account. Note: File upload in MCP context has limitations.

avatar_path.description: The local file path to the new avatar image (JPG/PNG format).

updated.description: Indicates whether the avatar was successfully updated.

avatar_path.description: The file path of the avatar image that was set.

tools.name: whatsapp_get_contacts
tools.description: Get the list of contacts from the logged-in WhatsApp account.

limit.description: Optional maximum number of contacts to return.

contacts.description: The list of contacts from the logged-in account.

phone.description: The phone number of the contact.

name.description: The display name of the contact.

is_registered.description: Indicates whether the contact is registered on WhatsApp.

tools.name: whatsapp_mark_message_read
tools.description: Mark messages as read in a WhatsApp chat or group.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the chat to mark messages as read.

message_id.description: Optional specific message ID to mark as read. Omit to mark all messages in the chat as read.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the chat.

marked_read.description: Indicates whether the messages were successfully marked as read.

tools.name: whatsapp_delete_message
tools.description: Delete a message from a WhatsApp chat or group.

phone.description: The phone number or group ID/JID of the chat containing the message.

message_id.description: The unique identifier of the message to delete.
The unique identifier of the message that was deleted.

deleted.description: Indicates whether the message was successfully deleted.
